```{python}
import pandas as pd

Crime = pd.read_csv('/Users/harryfranklin/Downloads/Crimes.csv')

Crime.head()

pd.set_option("display.max_columns", None)
pd.set_option("display.max_colwidth", None)
pd.set_option("display.width", None)

Crime.head(5)
```

```{python}
import geopandas as gpd
from shapely.geometry import Point

tracts = gpd.read_file("/Users/harryfranklin/Downloads/Census_20Tracts/Census_Tracts.shp")

geometry = [
    Point(xy) for xy in zip(Crime["Longitude"], Crime["Latitude"])
]

crimes_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    Crime,
    geometry=geometry,
    crs="EPSG:4326"  
)

tracts = tracts.to_crs(crimes_gdf.crs)

crimes_with_tracts = gpd.sjoin(
    crimes_gdf,
    tracts,
    how="left",
    predicate="within"
)

crimes_with_tracts
```

```{python}
Crime = crimes_with_tracts.iloc[:, :-14]
Crime["Date"] = pd.to_datetime(Crime["Date"])

Battery = Crime[Crime['Primary Type'] == 'BATTERY']
Assault = Crime[Crime['Primary Type'] == 'ASSAULT']
SA = Crime[Crime['Primary Type'].isin(["CRIMINAL SEXUAL ASSAULT", "CRIM SEXUAL ASSAULT"])]
Homicide = Crime[Crime['Primary Type'] == 'HOMICIDE']
DV = Crime[Crime['Primary Type'] == 'DOMESTIC VIOLENCE']

Pop2023 = pd.read_csv("/Users/harryfranklin/Downloads/Population.csv")
Crime["CENSUS_T_1"] = Crime["CENSUS_T_1"].astype(str)
Pop2023["GEOID"] = Pop2023["GEOID"].astype(str)
Crime = Crime.merge(
    Pop2023[["GEOID", "Population"]],
    left_on="CENSUS_T_1",
    right_on="GEOID",
    how="left"
)

Crime = Crime.drop(
    columns=[col for col in Crime.columns if "GEOID" in col],
    errors="ignore"
)

Crime
```

```{python}
import altair as alt
alt.data_transformers.disable_max_rows()
monthly = (
    Battery
    .groupby(pd.Grouper(key="Date", freq="M"))
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="monthly_count")
)

chart1 = (
    alt.Chart(monthly)
    .mark_line(point=True)
    .encode(
        x=alt.X(
            "Date:T",
            title="Month"
        ),
        y=alt.Y(
            "monthly_count:Q",
            title="Number of Battery Crimes"
        ),
        tooltip=[
            alt.Tooltip("Date:T", title="Month"),
            alt.Tooltip("monthly_count:Q", title="Count")
        ]
    )
    .properties(
        title="Reported Battery Crimes by Month (2021–2025)",
        width=700,
        height=400
    )
)

chart1
```

```{python}
monthly = (
    Homicide
    .groupby(pd.Grouper(key="Date", freq="M"))
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="monthly_count")
)

chart2 = (
    alt.Chart(monthly)
    .mark_line(point=True)
    .encode(
        x=alt.X(
            "Date:T",
            title="Month"
        ),
        y=alt.Y(
            "monthly_count:Q",
            title="Number of Homicide Crimes"
        ),
        tooltip=[
            alt.Tooltip("Date:T", title="Month"),
            alt.Tooltip("monthly_count:Q", title="Count")
        ]
    )
    .properties(
        title="Reported Homicide Crimes by Month (2021–2025)",
        width=700,
        height=400
    )
)

chart2
```

```{python}
monthly = (
    SA
    .groupby(pd.Grouper(key="Date", freq="M"))
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="monthly_count")
)

chart3 = (
    alt.Chart(monthly)
    .mark_line(point=True)
    .encode(
        x=alt.X(
            "Date:T",
            title="Month"
        ),
        y=alt.Y(
            "monthly_count:Q",
            title="Number of Sexual Assault Crimes"
        ),
        tooltip=[
            alt.Tooltip("Date:T", title="Month"),
            alt.Tooltip("monthly_count:Q", title="Count")
        ]
    )
    .properties(
        title="Reported Sexual Assault Crimes by Month (2021–2025)",
        width=700,
        height=400
    )
)

chart3
```

```{python}
monthly = (
    Assault
    .groupby(pd.Grouper(key="Date", freq="M"))
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="monthly_count")
)

chart4 = (
    alt.Chart(monthly)
    .mark_line(point=True)
    .encode(
        x=alt.X(
            "Date:T",
            title="Month"
        ),
        y=alt.Y(
            "monthly_count:Q",
            title="Number of Assault Crimes"
        ),
        tooltip=[
            alt.Tooltip("Date:T", title="Month"),
            alt.Tooltip("monthly_count:Q", title="Count")
        ]
    )
    .properties(
        title="Reported Assault Crimes by Month (2021–2025)",
        width=700,
        height=400
    )
)

chart4
```

```{python}
Assault["Date"] = pd.to_datetime(Assault["Date"])

if "quintile" in Assault.columns:
    Assault = Assault.drop(columns=["quintile"])

tract_counts = (
    Assault
    .groupby("CENSUS_T_1")
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="total_assaults")
)

tract_counts["quintile"] = pd.qcut(
    tract_counts["total_assaults"],
    5,
    labels=["Q1 (Lowest)", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4", "Q5 (Highest)"]
)

Assault = Assault.merge(
    tract_counts[["CENSUS_T_1", "quintile"]],
    on="CENSUS_T_1",
    how="left"
)

Assault["month"] = Assault["Date"].dt.to_period("M").dt.to_timestamp()

quintile_time = (
    Assault
    .groupby(["month", "quintile"])
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="assault_count")
)

chart5 = (
    alt.Chart(quintile_time)
    .mark_line()
    .encode(
        x=alt.X("month:T", title="Month"),
        y=alt.Y("assault_count:Q", title="Number of Assaults"),
        color=alt.Color("quintile:N", title="Census Tract Quintile"),
    )
    .properties(
        width=700,
        height=400,
        title="Monthly Assaults by Census Tract Quintile"
    )
)

chart5
```

```{python}
Battery["Date"] = pd.to_datetime(Battery["Date"])

if "quintile" in Battery.columns:
    Battery = Battery.drop(columns=["quintile"])

tract_counts = (
    Battery
    .groupby("CENSUS_T_1")
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="total_batteries")
)

tract_counts["quintile"] = pd.qcut(
    tract_counts["total_batteries"],
    5,
    labels=["Q1 (Lowest)", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4", "Q5 (Highest)"]
)

Battery = Battery.merge(
    tract_counts[["CENSUS_T_1", "quintile"]],
    on="CENSUS_T_1",
    how="left"
)

Battery["month"] = Battery["Date"].dt.to_period("M").dt.to_timestamp()

quintile_time = (
    Battery
    .groupby(["month", "quintile"])
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="battery_count")
)

chart6 = (
    alt.Chart(quintile_time)
    .mark_line()
    .encode(
        x=alt.X("month:T", title="Month"),
        y=alt.Y("battery_count:Q", title="Number of Batteries"),
        color=alt.Color("quintile:N", title="Census Tract Quintile"),
    )
    .properties(
        width=700,
        height=400,
        title="Monthly Batteries by Census Tract Quintile"
    )
)

chart6
```

```{python}
SA["Date"] = pd.to_datetime(SA["Date"])

if "quintile" in SA.columns:
    SA = SA.drop(columns=["quintile"])

tract_counts = (
    SA
    .groupby("CENSUS_T_1")
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="total_sexual_assaults")
)

tract_counts["quintile"] = pd.qcut(
    tract_counts["total_sexual_assaults"],
    5,
    labels=["Q1 (Lowest)", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4", "Q5 (Highest)"]
)

SA = SA.merge(
    tract_counts[["CENSUS_T_1", "quintile"]],
    on="CENSUS_T_1",
    how="left"
)

SA["month"] = SA["Date"].dt.to_period("M").dt.to_timestamp()

quintile_time = (
    SA
    .groupby(["month", "quintile"])
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="sexual_assault_count")
)

chart7 = (
    alt.Chart(quintile_time)
    .mark_line()
    .encode(
        x=alt.X("month:T", title="Month"),
        y=alt.Y("sexual_assault_count:Q", title="Number of Sexual Assaults"),
        color=alt.Color("quintile:N", title="Census Tract Quintile"),
    )
    .properties(
        width=700,
        height=400,
        title="Monthly Sexual Assaults by Census Tract Quintile"
    )
)

chart7
```

```{python}
Homicide["Date"] = pd.to_datetime(Homicide["Date"])

if "quintile" in Homicide.columns:
    Homicide = Homicide.drop(columns=["quintile"])

tract_counts = (
    Homicide
    .groupby("CENSUS_T_1")
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="total_homicides")
)

tract_counts = tract_counts.sort_values("total_homicides")

tract_counts["quintile"] = pd.qcut(
    tract_counts["total_homicides"].rank(method="first"),
    5,
    labels=["Q1 (Lowest)", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4", "Q5 (Highest)"]
)

Homicide = Homicide.merge(
    tract_counts[["CENSUS_T_1", "quintile"]],
    on="CENSUS_T_1",
    how="left"
)

Homicide["month"] = Homicide["Date"].dt.to_period("M").dt.to_timestamp()

quintile_time = (
    Homicide
    .groupby(["month", "quintile"])
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="homicide_count")
)

chart8 = (
    alt.Chart(quintile_time)
    .mark_line()
    .encode(
        x=alt.X("month:T", title="Month"),
        y=alt.Y("homicide_count:Q", title="Number of Homicides"),
        color=alt.Color("quintile:N", title="Census Tract Quintile"),
    )
    .properties(
        width=700,
        height=400,
        title="Monthly Homicides by Census Tract Quintile"
    )
)

chart8
```

```{python}
Crime["Primary Type"] = Crime["Primary Type"].replace(
    ["CRIM SEXUAL ASSAULT", "CRIMINAL SEXUAL ASSAULT"],
    "SEXUAL ASSAULT"
)
Crime["Date"] = pd.to_datetime(Crime["Date"])
Crime2023 = Crime[Crime["Date"].dt.year == 2023].copy()

PMH2023 = pd.read_csv("/Users/harryfranklin/Downloads/PMH2023.csv")
Crime2023["CENSUS_T_1"] = Crime2023["CENSUS_T_1"].astype(str)
PMH2023["GEOID"] = PMH2023["GEOID"].astype(str)
Crime2023 = Crime2023.merge(
    PMH2023[["GEOID", "PMH_2023"]],
    left_on="CENSUS_T_1",
    right_on="GEOID",
    how="left"
)

Crime2023 = Crime2023.drop(
    columns=[col for col in Crime2023.columns if "GEOID" in col],
    errors="ignore"
)

SES2023 = pd.read_csv("/Users/harryfranklin/Downloads/SES2023.csv")
Crime2023["CENSUS_T_1"] = Crime2023["CENSUS_T_1"].astype(str)
SES2023["GEOID"] = SES2023["GEOID"].astype(str)
Crime2023 = Crime2023.merge(
    SES2023[["GEOID", "SES_2023"]],
    left_on="CENSUS_T_1",
    right_on="GEOID",
    how="left"
)

Crime2023 = Crime2023.drop(
    columns=[col for col in Crime2023.columns if "GEOID" in col],
    errors="ignore"
)

HI2023 = pd.read_csv("/Users/harryfranklin/Downloads/HI2023.csv")
Crime2023["CENSUS_T_1"] = Crime2023["CENSUS_T_1"].astype(str)
HI2023["GEOID"] = HI2023["GEOID"].astype(str)
Crime2023 = Crime2023.merge(
    HI2023[["GEOID", "HDX_2019-2023"]],
    left_on="CENSUS_T_1",
    right_on="GEOID",
    how="left"
)

Crime2023 = Crime2023.drop(
    columns=[col for col in Crime2023.columns if "GEOID" in col],
    errors="ignore"
)

CHI2023 = pd.read_csv("/Users/harryfranklin/Downloads/CHI2023.csv")
Crime2023["CENSUS_T_1"] = Crime2023["CENSUS_T_1"].astype(str)
CHI2023["GEOID"] = CHI2023["GEOID"].astype(str)
Crime2023 = Crime2023.merge(
    CHI2023[["GEOID", "CHACFZN_2023"]],
    left_on="CENSUS_T_1",
    right_on="GEOID",
    how="left"
)

Crime2023 = Crime2023.drop(
    columns=[col for col in Crime2023.columns if "GEOID" in col],
    errors="ignore"
)

Crime2023 = Crime2023.rename(columns={"HDX_2019-2023": "HDX"})
Crime2023 = Crime2023.rename(columns={"CHACFZN_2023": "COI"})

Crime2023 = Crime2023.rename(columns={"PMH_2023": "PMH"})
Crime2023 = Crime2023.rename(columns={"SES_2023": "SES"})
Crime2023 = Crime2023.dropna(subset=["Population"])

Crime2023["Population"] = (
    Crime2023["Population"]
    .astype(str)            # ensure it's a string first
    .str.replace(",", "", regex=False)
    .str.strip()
)
Crime2023["Population"] = pd.to_numeric(Crime2023["Population"], errors="coerce")

tract_vars = (
    Crime2023.groupby("CENSUS_T_1", as_index=False)
    .agg({
        "PMH": "first",
        "SES": "first",
        "HDX": "first",
        "COI": "first",
        "Population": "first"
    })
)

cols_to_numeric = ["PMH", "SES", "HDX", "COI"]
for col in cols_to_numeric:
    Crime2023[col] = pd.to_numeric(Crime2023[col], errors="coerce")

# Clean Population separately
Crime2023["Population"] = (
    Crime2023["Population"].astype(str)
    .str.replace(",", "", regex=False)
    .str.strip()
)
Crime2023["Population"] = pd.to_numeric(Crime2023["Population"], errors="coerce")

Crime2023["Date"] = pd.to_datetime(Crime2023["Date"])

# Count crimes per tract
tract_crime = (
    Crime2023
    .groupby("CENSUS_T_1")
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="crime_count")
)

# Aggregate tract-level variables
tract_vars = (
    Crime2023.groupby("CENSUS_T_1", as_index=False)
    .agg({
        "PMH": "first",
        "SES": "first",
        "HDX": "first",
        "COI": "first",
        "Population": "first"
    })
)

# Merge counts with tract variables
tract_data = tract_crime.merge(tract_vars, on="CENSUS_T_1", how="left")

# Keep only tracts with positive population
tract_data = tract_data[tract_data["Population"] > 0]

# Compute crime rate
tract_data["crime_rate"] = (tract_data["crime_count"] / tract_data["Population"]) * 1000

# Compute correlations
corr_cols = ["crime_rate", "PMH", "SES", "HDX", "COI"]
correlations = tract_data[corr_cols].corr(method="pearson")
print(correlations["crime_rate"].sort_values(ascending=False))
```

```{python}
import geopandas as gpd

PATH = "data/Census_20Tracts/Census_Tracts.shp"
gdf = gpd.read_file(PATH)
gdf = gdf.to_crs(epsg=4326)

import altair as alt
import pandas as pd
import json

Crime2023["CENSUS_T_1"] = Crime2023["CENSUS_T_1"].astype(str)
gdf["CENSUS_T_1"] = gdf["CENSUS_T_1"].astype(str)


tract_crimes = (
    Crime2023.groupby("CENSUS_T_1")
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="total_crimes")
)

tract_crimes = tract_crimes.merge(
    Crime2023[["CENSUS_T_1", "Population"]].drop_duplicates(),
    on="CENSUS_T_1",
    how="left"
)

tract_crimes["crime_rate"] = (tract_crimes["total_crimes"] / tract_crimes["Population"]) * 1000

gdf = gdf.drop(columns=[col for col in gdf.columns if "crime_rate" in col], errors="ignore")
gdf = gdf.merge(
    tract_crimes[["CENSUS_T_1", "crime_rate"]],
    on="CENSUS_T_1",
    how="left"
)

gdf["crime_rate"] = gdf["crime_rate"].fillna(0)  

gdf_json = json.loads(gdf.to_json())

chart9 = alt.Chart(alt.Data(values=gdf_json['features'])).mark_geoshape().encode(
    color=alt.Color(
        'properties.crime_rate:Q',
        scale=alt.Scale(scheme='reds'),
        title='Crime Rate per 1,000 Residents'
    ),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip('properties.CENSUS_T_1:N', title='Census Tract'),
        alt.Tooltip('properties.crime_rate:Q', title='Crime Rate')
    ]
).properties(
    width=700,
    height=700,
    title='Chicago Crime Rate by Census Tract (2023)'
).project('mercator')  # ← use mercator projection to orient north-up

chart9
```

```{python}
Crime2023["CENSUS_T_1"] = Crime2023["CENSUS_T_1"].astype(str)
gdf["CENSUS_T_1"] = gdf["CENSUS_T_1"].astype(str)

# Compute crime rate per 1,000 residents
tract_data = (
    Crime2023.groupby("CENSUS_T_1")
    .agg(
        total_crimes=('CENSUS_T_1', 'size'),
        Population=('Population', 'first'),
        PMH=('PMH', 'first'),
        SES=('SES', 'first'),
        HDX=('HDX', 'first'),
        COI=('COI', 'first')
    )
    .reset_index()
)

tract_data["crime_rate"] = (tract_data["total_crimes"] / tract_data["Population"]) * 1000

gdf = gdf.merge(
    tract_data[['CENSUS_T_1', 'crime_rate', 'PMH', 'SES', 'HDX', 'COI']],
    on='CENSUS_T_1',
    how='left'
)

for col in ['PMH','SES','HDX','COI']:
    gdf[col] = gdf[col].fillna(0)

gdf_json = json.loads(gdf.to_json())
```

```{python}
def plot_chicago_heatmap(var, title=None, color_scheme='reds'):
    if title is None:
        title = f'Chicago {var} by Census Tract (2023)'
    
    chart = alt.Chart(alt.Data(values=gdf_json['features'])).mark_geoshape().encode(
        color=alt.Color(
            f'properties.{var}:Q',
            scale=alt.Scale(scheme=color_scheme),
            title=var.replace('_',' ')
        ),
        tooltip=[
            alt.Tooltip('properties.CENSUS_T_1:N', title='Census Tract'),
            alt.Tooltip(f'properties.{var}:Q', title=var.replace('_',' '))
        ]
    ).properties(
        width=700,
        height=700,
        title=title
    ).project('mercator')
    
    return chart

plot_chicago_heatmap('PMH', 'Chicago % Poor Mental Health by Census Tract (2023)', color_scheme='blues')
```

```{python}
plot_chicago_heatmap('SES', 'Chicago % Lacking Social/Emotional Support by Census Tract (2023)', color_scheme='purples')
```

```{python}
plot_chicago_heatmap('PMH', 'Chicago % Child Opportunity Index by Census Tract (2023)', color_scheme='greens')
```

```{python}
plot_chicago_heatmap('HDX', 'Chicago % Hardship Index by Census Tract (2023)', color_scheme='oranges')
```
